title: [epic] LilyGO T-Deck support
description: LilyGO T-Deck: ESP32-S3 + SX1262 + WiFi + 2.8" screen + keyboard + trackball. Board files exist at lichen/boards/lilygo/t_deck/. Good for: handheld terminal, border router with UI. $60.
notes: Commit: 7038610c1 - Added I2C, INPUT, DISPLAY, ST7789V to t_deck_esp32s3_procpu_defconfig. Progress on keyboard/trackball/display support for T-Deck epic. Child beads filed.
close_reason: Board config updated for peripherals (commit 7038610c1). Epic advanced; children tracked separately.
